title: First Notice of Loss — Recorded Intake Call (Transcript)

transcript.speaker: CSR
transcript.text: Thank you for calling. This is Daniel, can I get your full name and policy number to start?

transcript.speaker: Insured
transcript.text: Yes, Maria Chen. The policy is HO-TX-9924-7716.

transcript.speaker: CSR
transcript.text: Thanks Maria. I have you at 4521 Oak Ridge Drive in Plano, is that correct?

transcript.speaker: Insured
transcript.text: Correct, that's the property.

transcript.speaker: CSR
transcript.text: What are you calling about today?

transcript.speaker: Insured
transcript.text: We had a really bad hailstorm yesterday afternoon. Roof is hammered. Some hail came through the kitchen skylight too — there's water on the ceiling now.

transcript.speaker: CSR
transcript.text: I'm sorry to hear that. Can you confirm the date of loss for me?

transcript.speaker: Insured
transcript.text: April twenty-second. Yesterday. It started around four in the afternoon.

transcript.speaker: CSR
transcript.text: Were you on the property when it happened?

transcript.speaker: Insured
transcript.text: Yes. I was home when it hit. It was loud — it sounded like rocks on the roof.

transcript.speaker: CSR
transcript.text: Did anyone get hurt?

transcript.speaker: Insured
transcript.text: No, no injuries. Just property.

transcript.speaker: CSR
transcript.text: Have you taken any steps to mitigate further damage — tarping, covering the skylight?

transcript.speaker: Insured
transcript.text: We had a roofer come out and tarp the skylight area the next morning. There's a receipt for that, I'll send it over with everything else.

transcript.speaker: CSR
transcript.text: Great. What damage have you observed visually?

transcript.speaker: Insured
transcript.text: The whole south side of the roof looks chewed up. The west side too, but maybe less. The front gutter is dented. Skylight in the kitchen is cracked. Water staining on the kitchen ceiling under it.

transcript.speaker: CSR
transcript.text: Have you contacted a contractor for an estimate?

transcript.speaker: Insured
transcript.text: Yes — Lone Star Premier Roofing came out today. They told me they'd send the bid by end of week.

transcript.speaker: CSR
transcript.text: Understood. I'm assigning this to adjuster Maria Wells. She'll reach out within one business day. Anything else for now?

transcript.speaker: Insured
transcript.text: No, that's everything. Thanks.

transcript.speaker: CSR
transcript.text: Thank you. Claim number is HO-2026-04-04217. Have a good day.
